title: nepeta stachyoides var. antiatlantica
intro: Nepeta stachyoides var. antiatlantica is a lesser-known variety of catmint, a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula and northwestern Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include relieving digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Nepeta stachyoides var. antiatlantica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile addition to traditional remedies.
